name: Easy Yellow Cake
recipeIngredient: Martha White All-Purpose Flour (2 cups, sifted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add the sugar, shortening, butter or margarine, milk, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix with an electric mixer on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the sides of the bowl often.
5. Turn the mixer to high speed and beat until well combined, about 3 minutes, scraping the bowl frequently.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a wire rack before serving.
